hero.title: Welcome to robinsoft
hero.p1: We are the robinsoft development team, focusing on multimedia and cloud solutions. Our current product includes CloudMediaPlayer, and more products will be released.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.p: Build simple, reliable and creative software to help users better manage and play multimedia content.

more.p: We are working on more products, stay tuned.

cmp.title: CloudMediaPlayer
cmp.p: CloudMediaPlayer is a cloud-based media player and manager that supports streaming, playlist management and cross-device sync.

about.title: About robinsoft
about.heading: About us
about.p: robinsoft is a development team focused on multimedia and cloud services. Our goal is to deliver stable, simple and powerful applications to users.
